allow: Bash(node -e "const { LocalOrderbook } = require\('./core/localOrderbook'\); const b = new LocalOrderbook\('test'\); b.update\({ bids: [{price:0.45,size:10},{price:0.44,size:5}], asks: [{price:0.47,size:8},{price:0.48,size:3}] }\); console.log\('bestBid:', b.bestBid, 'bestAsk:', b.bestAsk, 'mid:', b.mid\); const q = b.selectTakerQuote\({isBuy:true,requestedSize:6,maxSlippage:0.05,referencePrice:0.45,maxNotional:5,tickSize:'0.01',minFillSize:1}\); console.log\('quote:', JSON.stringify\(q\)\); console.log\('sellPrice:', b.getBestSellPrice\(\)\); console.log\('stale\(1ms\):', b.isStale\(1\)\);")
